REQUEST TO TAKE OFF CALENDAR OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, CONTINUE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFEERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF SEGLENDA CRIGLER'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON PLEADING IS OFF CALENDAR. ON MAY 1, 2014, THE COURT ISSUED AN ORDER DETERMINING THAT PLAINTIFF SEGLENDA CRIGLER TO BE A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT. THE ACTION IS STAYED UNTIL 10 DAYS AFTER PLAINTIFF FILES A BOND IN THE AMOUNT $5,000.00 WITH THE COURT AND SAFEWAY HAS BEEN GIVEN WRITTEN NOTICE THEREOF. NO BOND HAS BEEN FILED WITH THE COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: MARIA VISCIO #12353. (302)

ORDER - PREFILING ORDER - VEXATIOUS LITIGANT

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: PLAINTIFF DID NOT FILE ANY WRITTEN OPPOSITION. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.'S MOTION FOR RELIEF UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE TITLE 3A - VEXATIOUS LITIGANTS - CCP SEC. 391, ET SEQ. IS GRANTED. THE REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. MISS CRIGLER IS REQUIRED TO POST A BOND IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,000.00 PAYABLE NO LATER THAN 15 DAYS AFTER NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDERS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2014 Continued To Aug-20-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On Pleading Attachments Memorandum Supporting Mtn
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Seglenda Crigler, 415.545.3855, plaintiff in propria persona; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SEGLENDA CRIGLER's Motion For Judgment On Pleading is off calendar. On May 1, 2014, the Court issued an order determining that Plaintiff Seglenda Crigler to be a vexatious litigant. The action is stayed until 10 days after Plaintiff files a bond in the amount $ 5,000.00 with the court and Safeway has been given written notice thereof. No bond has been filed with the Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Maria Viscio #12353.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2014 Continued To Jun-18-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Relief Under Code Of Civil Procedure Title 3a - Vexatious Litigants - Ccp Sec. 391, Et Seq.;
Off Calendar May-01-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
J. Cross Creason, Esq. of Dillingham and Murphy, Tel. 415.397.2700, for defendant and moving party;
Seglenda Crigler, Tel. 415.545.3855, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: Plaintiff did not file any written opposition. The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.'S Motion For Relief Under Code Of Civil Procedure Title 3a - Vexatious Litigants - CCP Sec. 391, Et Seq. is granted. The request for judicial notice is granted. Miss Crigler is required to post a bond in the amount of $5,000.00 payable no later than 15 days after notice of entry of order. ORDERS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
